PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Sep-21-2020 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Aug-17-2020 Continued To Sep-21-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Shaun Carberry for Angela Blackwell (Executor).

Mr. Carberry provided a proposed order. The Petition to Terminate Estate is continued to September 21, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for review of the order.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-28-2020 Continued To Feb-25-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on February 25, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
